top_signals.title: Japan's economy grows at annualized 2.1% rate in first quarter, beating expectations
top_signals.summary: The growth was sharply higher compared with Reuters-polled analysts' average estimate of 1.7%, and against the 1.3% in the previous quarter.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
